summary: Tested homepage UI cleanup (no redundant logo/search in hero) and Badge/Achievement system. All 9 backend tests passed. UI verified showing compact badges on profile, badges tab with earned/in-progress sections.
critical_code_review_comments: HOMEPAGE VERIFIED: Hero section has NO redundant logo/title 'Hispaloshop' - only in header
HOMEPAGE VERIFIED: Hero section has NO search bar - starts directly with 20 category icons
API VERIFIED: GET /api/badges returns 11 badge definitions with correct structure
API VERIFIED: GET /api/users/{user_id}/badges returns badge progress with 'earned', 'current', 'threshold'
API VERIFIED: POST /api/users/{user_id}/badges/check requires auth and only works for own user
UI VERIFIED: User profile compact badges shown as pill-shaped chips under bio (3 badges: First Order, First Post, Star Recipe)
UI VERIFIED: Badges tab with trophy icon and 'ACHIEVEMENTS' label found with data-testid='badges-tab'
UI VERIFIED: Badges grid shows 'EARNED ACHIEVEMENTS (3)' with colored icons and dates
UI VERIFIED: Badges grid shows 'IN PROGRESS (8)' with lock icons and progress bars
context_for_next_testing_agent: Badge system fully tested. User user_test123 has 3 earned badges (first_order, first_post, first_recipe). Profile route is /user/:userId not /profile/:userId. Homepage hero has 20 category icons, no redundant logo/search.

features_verified.homepage_no_redundant_logo: PASS - Hero section has no Hispaloshop title (only in header)
features_verified.homepage_no_search_bar: PASS - Hero section has no search bar
features_verified.homepage_category_icons: PASS - Hero starts with 20 category icons
features_verified.ui_compact_badges: PASS - Shows 3 earned badge pills under bio
features_verified.ui_badges_grid_earned: PASS - Shows earned badges with colored icons
features_verified.ui_badges_grid_progress: PASS - Shows unearned badges with lock + progress bars
